episodes.title: #EP 171 - The False Prophet Spiral
episodes.description: Bit of a life update ep — what we’ve been doing, what’s been on our minds, and the usual chaotic catch-up. Then we get fully sucked into Trust Me: The False Prophet on Netflix… which turns into a whole conversation about religion, belief, and how these stories actually happen. Kolide Advice Ella Love On the Spectrum Season 4 - Netflix Supernatural Crème Cleanser - Emma Lewisham Cedar Veil Magnisum Spray - SISU Fire & Spice Tonic - SISU ﻿A quick note before we listening: today’s episode covers sensitive topics, including sexual misconduct and cult manipulation. We want to ensure you are taking care of yourself, so please listen safely xx Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.
